note: Scoped review by fresh maker-not-checker agents; 3 distinct confirmed findings (all minor; the dead-key finding was raised by both dimensions). All fixed and verified by a green battery (365 tests). Security: keyless /api/forecast proxy, no secrets, client-only state; full sweep at G7.
fixedFindings: Dead i18n key compareNoWeekendData now wired into the empty weekend cell as an sr-only label (announces why the cell is empty instead of a bare em dash)
Limit notice no longer stays stale: gated on atLimit && canPinActive, so navigating to an already-pinned active city hides both the pin control and the notice
WCAG 2.5.3 label-in-name: the pin button's aria-label now contains its visible label ('Закріпити це місто — <city>')
